info.title: SaaS Boilerplate API
info.description: Organisation-first SaaS boilerplate API. v0.11.0 adds Audit Logging Expansion and Security Events: protected organisation and platform audit log visibility, a SecurityEvent collection, reusable audit/security helpers, and security event logging for login, logout, token, SSO, MFA and auth policy changes. Internal/External classification remains in endpoint descriptions while Audit and Security domain tags are introduced.

tags.name: External
tags.description: Public or external-consumer APIs. Authentication requirements are shown per endpoint.

tags.name: Internal
tags.description: Platform/admin/organisation APIs. These use user session tokens or scoped personal access tokens unless otherwise noted.

tags.name: Audit
tags.description: Audit log visibility APIs for organisation and platform administrators.

tags.name: Security
tags.description: Security event visibility APIs for organisation and platform administrators.

UserSessionAuth.description: Short-lived logged-in user token used by the frontend and Postman during development.

PersonalAccessTokenAuth.description: Long-lived user-owned scoped token for Postman, scripts and user automation.

OrganisationApiTokenAuth.description: Organisation-owned token for external/system-to-system integrations. Uses external audience and external:* scopes.

ServiceAccountTokenAuth.description: Reserved for later service identity requirements.

get.description: Returns API and MongoDB connection status. Authentication: none.
Interactive Swagger/OpenAPI documentation route mounted under /api/docs. Authentication: none.
Raw OpenAPI JSON document route mounted under /api/openapi.json. Authentication: none.
Returns safe public login configuration by organisation slug or domain. Authentication: none.

200.description: Get public organisation login branding succeeded.

get.description: Returns safe public organisation theme and branding tokens. Authentication: none.
Serves active provider-backed branding FileAsset images for public login/theme rendering. Authentication: none.
Serves legacy v0.7.1 local development branding assets for backwards compatibility. Authentication: none.

200.description: Get legacy public branding asset succeeded.

get.description: Returns safe public native/SSO auth options. Authentication: none.

200.description: Get public organisation auth options succeeded.

get.description: Returns safe public MFA policy hints for login screens. Authentication: none.

200.description: Get public organisation MFA policy succeeded.

get.description: Returns safe public SSO options for future OIDC/SAML login screens. Authentication: none.

200.description: Get public organisation SSO options succeeded.

post.description: Authenticates an organisation-owned native user and returns a user_session_token. Authentication: none.

get.description: Returns current authenticated user, organisation, roles and permissions. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: auth:me.

post.description: Acknowledges logout for stateless local bearer token usage. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: auth:me.

get.description: Returns token type, audience, scopes and MFA-aware token metadata. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: tokens.policy.view.
Returns global permission catalogue. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: permissions.view.
Returns model/index/collection status for the internal MongoDB schema foundation. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: internal.schema.view.
Lists platform organisations. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: platform.organisations.view.

post.description: Creates a platform organisation. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: platform.organisations.manage.

get.description: Returns one organisation by id. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: platform.organisations.view.

patch.description: Updates organisation profile/domain metadata. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: platform.organisations.manage.
Updates organisation active/inactive/suspended state. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: platform.organisations.manage.

get.description: Lists audit logs for the authenticated organisation. Supports page, limit, action, resource_type, actor_user_id, from and to query filters. Scope: organisation. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: audit.view.
Returns one audit log that belongs to the authenticated organisation. Scope: organisation. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: audit.view.
Lists audit logs across organisations for platform administrators. Scope: platform. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: audit.platform.view.
Returns one audit log across organisations for platform administrators. Scope: platform. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: audit.platform.view.

Lists audit logs for a selected organisation when the caller has platform audit visibility. Scope: platform. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: audit.platform.view.

200.description: List platform organisation audit logs succeeded.

get.description: Lists security events for the authenticated organisation. Supports page, limit, event_type, severity, status, actor_user_id, from and to query filters. Scope: organisation. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: security.events.view.

Returns one security event that belongs to the authenticated organisation. Scope: organisation. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: security.events.view.

Lists security events across organisations for platform administrators. Scope: platform. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: security.events.platform.view.

Returns one security event across organisations for platform administrators. Scope: platform. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: security.events.platform.view.

Lists security events for a selected organisation when the caller has platform security visibility. Scope: platform. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: security.events.platform.view.

200.description: List platform organisation security events succeeded.

get.description: Lists users under the requested organisation. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: users.view.

post.description: Creates a user under the requested organisation. Users cannot exist without an organisation. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: users.create.

get.description: Returns one user under the requested organisation. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: users.view.

patch.description: Updates user profile/auth/role metadata. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: users.update.
Enables/disables an organisation-owned user. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: users.disable.

get.description: Lists roles for the authenticated organisation. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: roles.view.

post.description: Creates an organisation-scoped role. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: roles.manage.

get.description: Returns one role in the authenticated organisation. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: roles.view.

patch.description: Updates role permissions/description. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: roles.manage.

delete.description: Deletes a non-system, unassigned role. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: roles.manage.

get.description: Returns branding and theme settings. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.branding.view.

patch.description: Updates login and website branding fields. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.branding.manage.

get.description: Returns website theme tokens. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.branding.view.

patch.description: Updates website theme tokens. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.branding.manage.

get.description: Exports current theme as YAML. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.branding.view.

post.description: Imports validated theme YAML. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.branding.manage.

201.description: Import organisation theme YAML created resource.

post.description: Uploads a base64 branding image, creates an organisation-owned FileAsset, captures image metadata, stores it through the configured local/Azure Blob storage provider, and links it to the organisation branding field. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.branding.manage.

delete.description: Clears a branding asset reference and archives the linked FileAsset when present. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.branding.manage.

get.description: Returns native/mixed/SSO-ready auth configuration. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.auth.view.

patch.description: Updates native/SSO-ready auth settings. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.auth.manage.

201.description: Update organisation auth config created resource.

get.description: Returns provider-neutral MFA policy metadata. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.mfa.view.

patch.description: Updates provider-neutral MFA policy metadata. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.mfa.manage.

201.description: Update organisation MFA policy created resource.

get.description: Returns setup hints for Keycloak, Azure Entra, Okta, Google and custom OIDC. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.sso.view.
Returns saved SSO provider configuration. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.sso.view.

patch.description: Updates SSO provider configuration for future OIDC/SAML login. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.sso.manage.

201.description: Update organisation SSO config created resource.

post.description: Runs local validation against saved SSO provider configuration. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.sso.view.

201.description: Validate organisation SSO config created resource.

get.description: Returns global feature entitlement catalogue. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: features.view.
Returns organisation feature entitlement state. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: features.view.

patch.description: Updates organisation feature entitlement flags. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: features.manage.

get.description: Returns SaaS plan catalogue, feature defaults and limits. No payment gateway is active in v0.9.1. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: plans.view.

post.description: Creates/updates a plan catalogue item for subscription readiness. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: plans.manage.

201.description: Create or upsert plan created resource.

get.description: Returns one plan catalogue item. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: plans.view.

patch.description: Updates plan pricing placeholders, feature defaults or limits. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: plans.manage.

201.description: Update plan by key created resource.

get.description: Returns the authenticated organisation's plan assignment, effective limits and feature readiness metadata. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: plans.view.
Returns plan assignment for a requested organisation. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: plans.view.

patch.description: Assigns a plan and optionally applies plan feature defaults and limits. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: plans.manage.

post.description: Applies assigned plan feature defaults and limits to the organisation. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: plans.manage.

201.description: Apply organisation plan defaults created resource.

get.description: Lists file assets for the authenticated organisation. Requires feature: file_uploads. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: files.view.

post.description: Uploads a base64 file payload through the configured storage provider. Local storage is used by default; Azure Blob/Azurite can be selected with STORAGE_PROVIDER=azure_blob. Requires feature: file_uploads and plan file/storage limit checks. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: files.upload.

get.description: Returns file metadata for one organisation-owned file. Requires feature: file_uploads. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: files.view.

delete.description: Archives an organisation-owned file asset while keeping metadata for auditability. Requires feature: file_uploads. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: files.delete.

get.description: Downloads one active organisation-owned file through the configured storage provider. Requires feature: file_uploads. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: files.view.
Lists current user's personal access tokens. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: tokens.personal.manage.

post.description: Creates a user-owned long-lived scoped token. Raw token is returned once. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: tokens.personal.manage.

201.description: Create personal access token created resource.

delete.description: Revokes a user-owned personal access token. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: tokens.personal.manage.

201.description: Revoke personal access token created resource.

get.description: Lists organisation-owned external integration tokens. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: tokens.organisation.manage.

post.description: Creates an organisation-owned external integration token. Raw token is returned once. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: tokens.organisation.manage.

201.description: Create organisation API token created resource.

patch.description: Updates organisation API token status. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: tokens.organisation.manage.

200.description: Update organisation API token status succeeded.

201.description: Update organisation API token status created resource.

delete.description: Revokes an organisation API token. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: tokens.organisation.manage.

201.description: Revoke organisation API token created resource.

get.description: Validates an organisation_api_token and returns external token context. Authentication: OrganisationApiTokenAuth. Required scope: external:organisation.read.
